team_description: A small project-orchestration team. Orion breaks down work and routes it; Echo writes all content; Radar turns data into insights. Auto-detected from cross-references in source SOUL.md (Orion -> Echo, Radar).
team_intro_md:
## The Coordinator Trio

**Orion** breaks complex projects into actionable tasks and routes them.
**Echo** handles all content creation — blog posts, copy, social, emails.
**Radar** turns data into insights and reports.

Try: ask Orion to plan a product launch, ask Echo to draft the announcement, ask Radar to compare last month vs this month.

This team was auto-detected from cross-references in the OpenClaw source SOUL.md files (Orion mentions Echo and Radar).

agents.name: Radar
agents.role: Data analyst and business intelligence specialist
